rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA BARNES et al VS. AC AND S, INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 8. Defendant CertainTeed Corporation¿s motion for summary adjudication on punitive damages is granted. Spain and Puerto Rico¿s laws control on the issue of availability of punitive damage s because the alleged exposures to defendant¿s asbestos cement pipe occurred in Spain and Puerto Rico. California¿s interest, if any, in having its punitive damages laws applied to this case as to defendant is very attenuated and must give way to the more substantial interest of Spain and Puerto Rico in having their laws apply to exposures that occurred in their jurisdictions. The hearing on this motion is continued on the court¿s own motion to Thursday November 18. Anyone wishing to contest the tentative ruling must send an email by 4:30pm today to contestasbestostr@sftc.org. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD HOFF et al VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 16, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 13. DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens is denied. Defendant failed to show that all of the remaining defendants would be subject to jurisdiction in Iowa. Defendant also failed to show, by weighing public and private interest factors, that California is a seriously inconvenient forum. The motion will be heard at 9am, not 9:30am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION*
rulings.Calendar Matter: Designated Defense Counsels Notice Of Motion And Motion To Recover Unreimbursed Costs And Fees Against Former Clients Of Jackson Wallace
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 16, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 20. DEFENDANT DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL Motion To Recover Unreimbursed Costs And Fees Against Former Clients Of Jackson Wallace. Berry & Berry¿s motion to recover unreimbursed costs and fees against former clients of Jackson and Wallace is continued on the court¿s own motion to Wednesday November 17 at 2pm. At that time the court would also like to discuss the related case of Berry & Berry v. Jackson, No. 503145. Counsel representing parties in both the civil action and Berry & Berry¿s motion should be prepared to discuss all procedural and substantive issues raised in the papers filed in support of and in opposition to the motion. There will be no substantive tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)
